title: Boryangraecum myrianthum
taxonomy: Boryangraecum myrianthum belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This epiphytic orchid is native to the tropical regions of Asia. Boryangraecum myrianthum is a species of orchid that is characterized by its unique flowers and leaves. The classification of Boryangraecum myrianthum is further detailed at the genus and species levels. It is often classified within the subtribe Aeridinae.
